resources.string: Used to monitor app launches to provide protection for your locked applications.
1. Enable Accessibility Service to detect app launches.
2. Allow \'Display over other apps\' to show the lock screen.
Prevents unauthorized deletion of apps by requiring biometrics to access the Package Installer.
Requires Device Admin to disable the "Uninstall" button in Android Settings.
Requires biometrics to open this app so others can\'t change your security settings.
Enabling this prevents Kura Locker from being uninstalled or stopped without your permission. This provides the highest level of security for your locked apps.
Prevents access to Android Settings to stop users from disabling the locker or clearing data.
